allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse src, supabase, docs, scripts -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem src\\pages, src\\hooks, src\\lib, src\\components, src\\contexts, src\\features -File -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\('C:\\Users\\Blvk Inc\\Desktop\\forma\\', ''\) })
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .env.local\) { Get-Content .env.local | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '='\)[0] } }; if \(Test-Path .env\) { Get-Content .env | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '='\)[0] } })

PowerShell(node -e "const c=require\('crypto'\); const mk=\(\)=>'FormaQA-'+c.randomBytes\(12\).toString\('base64url'\)+'!9'; const stamp=new Date\(\).toISOString\(\).replace\(/[-:TZ.]/g,''\).slice\(0,14\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({stamp, buyer:mk\(\), seller:mk\(\), admin:mk\(\)}\)\)")
